document_api_meta.title: Update Goods

request_header_param.name: x-tts-access-token
request_header_param.desc: The seller access_token value from [Get Access Token](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/678e3a3292b0f40314a92d75#Get%20Access%20Token%20API), when user_type = 0. Follow this [guide](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/678e3a344ddec3030b238fa0) to get seller access_token.

request_query_param.name: app_key
request_query_param.desc: Every single app will have a unique key. Please use the specific key assigned to your app.

request_query_param.name: sign
request_query_param.desc: Signature generated by gen algorithm. When you send API requests to TTS, you must sign them so that TTS can identify the senders.

request_query_param.name: timestamp
request_query_param.desc: Unix timestamp GMT (UTC+00:00). This timestamp is used across all API requests. Developers can use this convert to local time.

request_query_param.name: shop_cipher
request_query_param.desc:
Use this property to pass shop information in requesting the API. Failure in passing the correct value when requesting the API for cross-border shops will return incorrect response. 
Get by API [Get Authorization Shop](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/6507ead7b99d5302be949ba9?external_id=6507ead7b99d5302be949ba9)

request_body_param.name: ^tts_goods_id
request_body_param.desc: Identifier for Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) generated by TikTok Shop system

request_body_param.name: ^return_handling_method
request_body_param.desc:
The return handling method applied when enabling the FBT customer return service, the default value will be Restock sellable, Dispose unsellable
Possible values:
-Dispose_of_all_returned_units
-Restock_sellable_dispose_of_unsellable

request_body_param.name: ^^weight_unit
request_body_param.desc: Weight unit.Possible values:- MILLIGRAM - GRAM- KILOGRAM - POUND - OUNCE

request_body_param.name: ^^dimension_unit
request_body_param.desc:
Dimension unit. 
Possible values:
- MILLIMETER 
- CENTIMETER
- METER 
- FOOT 
- INCH

request_body_param.name: ^^^battery_type
request_body_param.desc:
Battery type
Possible values:
LITHIUM_ION
LITHIUM_METAL
OTHER

request_body_param.name: ^^^total_battery_weight_unit
request_body_param.desc: total battery weight unit, possible value:GRAM

request_body_param.name: ^^^is_need_un_38_3_test
request_body_param.desc: UN38.3 testing ensures that batteries meet specific safety criteria. Please send the report in the field if it's not included in the MSDS.

request_body_param.name: ^^^flammable_liquids_type
request_body_param.desc:
Flammable liquid type, possible values
-Paints
-Perfumery products
-Alcohols
-Other

request_body_param.name: ^^dg_uncode
request_body_param.desc:
UN number or UN ID is a 4-digit number that identifies hazardous substances
possible values
-UN2807
-UN3480
-UN3090
-UN3481
-UN3091
-UN1263
-UN1266
-UN3065
-OTHER

request_body_param.name: ^^msds_file_url
request_body_param.desc: Material safety data sheet of the hazmat goods to support review the goods' safety compliance in FBT

request_body_param.name: ^is_lot_code
request_body_param.desc:
if the product requires lot management based on FBT category rule
TRUE:this product requires lot control
FALSE:this product does not require lot control

request_body_param.name: ^^inbound_cutoff_days
request_body_param.desc: The goods inbound cutoff days before expiration, represent the time period before the product's expiration when the warehouse will no longer accept inbound shipments.

request_body_param.name: ^^expiration_alert_days
request_body_param.desc: The goods alert days before expired, represent the period of time before platform send expiration reminder alerts to the merchant.

request_body_param.name: ^^sales_cutoff_days
request_body_param.desc: The goods alert days before expired, represent the period of time before platform send expiration reminder alerts to the merchant.

request_body_param.name: ^^handling_method_expired_goods
request_body_param.desc:
The handling method for expired inventory. 
Possible values:
STORE_UNITS
RETURN_TO_SELLER
DISPOSE

request_body_param.name: ^^return_cycle
request_body_param.desc:
The return cycle applied when the handling method is set to RETURN_TO_SUPPLIER. In this case, the automatic creation of exit inventory orders will follow one of return cycle rules.
Possible values:
- ONCE_A_WEEK
- ONCE_A_MONTH
- ONCE_A_QUARTER

request_body_param.name: ^^^name
request_body_param.desc: The name of the contact person.

request_body_param.name: ^^^phone_number
request_body_param.desc: The phone number of the contact person.

request_body_param.name: ^^^postal_code
request_body_param.desc: postal code (also known as zip code)

request_body_param.name: ^^^region_code
request_body_param.desc: region code in two-character ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 format.

request_body_param.name: ^^^address_line2
request_body_param.desc: The detail address line 2, additional address information(optional).

response_param.name: code
response_param.desc: The success or failure status code returned in API response.

response_param.name: message
response_param.desc: The success or failure messages returned in API response. Reasons of failure will be described in the message.

response_param.name: ^^tts_goods_id
response_param.desc: Identifier for goods generated by Fulfilled by TikTok system

document_api_meta.request_body: {"update_goods_dto":{"tts_goods_id":"8839232030","goods_name":"ABC","goods_image_url":"https://img0.baidu.com/it/u=3591665277,2616537962\u0026fm=253\u0026app=138\u0026f=JPEG?w=800\u0026h=1333","reference_code":"ABDK999d","barcode_infos":[{"barcode_type":"1","barcode_value":"223333"}],"return_handling_method":"COLLECT_RETURN_UNITS","dimension_and_weight_base_info":{"weight_value":"1","length_value":"1","width_value":"1","height_value":"1","weight_unit":"1","dimension_unit":"1"},"is_hazmat":false,"hazmat_info":{"hazmat_type":"BATTERY","battery_extra_info":{"battery_type":"LITHIUM_ION","battery_packaging_type":"STANDALONE","total_battery_weight":"10","total_battery_weight_unit":"GRAM","total_battery_capacity":"2","total_battery_capacity_unit":"WATTHOUR","is_need_un_38_3_test":false,"un_38_3_test_file_url":"https://img0.baidu.com/it/u=3591665277,2616537962\u0026fm=253\u0026app=138\u0026f=JPEG?w=800\u0026h=1333","battery_count_per_package":"3"},"flammable_liquids_extra_info":{"flammable_liquids_type":"PAINT","flammable_liquids_volume":"1","volume_unit":"MILLILITERS"},"dg_class":"ClASS_3","dg_uncode":"UN2807","msds_file_url":"https://img0.baidu.com/it/u=3591665277,2616537962\u0026fm=253\u0026app=138\u0026f=JPEG?w=800\u0026h=1333"},"is_lot_code":false,"is_expiration_management":false,"shelf_life_attribute_info":{"shelf_life":10,"inbound_cutoff_days":90,"expiration_alert_days":80,"sales_cutoff_days":70,"handling_method_expired_goods":"DISPOSE","return_cycle":"ONCE_A_WEEK","return_address_info":{"name":"abc","phone_number":"12221212121","postal_code":"92376","region_code":"US","state":"CA","district":"San Bernardino","city":"Rialto","address_line1":"1420 Tamarind Ave, Rialto, San Bernardino","address_line2":"1420 Tamarind Ave, Rialto, San Bernardino"}}}}

sample_code.label: Curl
sample_code.value:
curl -X POST \
 'https://open-api.tiktokglobalshop.com/fbt/202603/goods/update_goods_info?app_key=38abcd&sign=5361235029d141222525e303d742f9e38aea052d10896d3197ab9d6233730b8c&timestamp=1623812664&shop_cipher=GCP_XF90igAAAABh00qsWgtvOiGFNqyubMt3' \
-H 'x-tts-access-token: TTP_pwSm2AAAAABmmtFz1xlyKMnwg74T2GJ5s0uQbS8jPjb_GkdFVCxPqzQXSyuyfXdQa0AqyDsea2tYFNVf4XeqgZHFfPyv0Vs659QqyLYfsGzanZ5XZAin3_ZkcIxxS0_In6u6XDeU96k' \
-H 'content-type: application/json' \
-d '{
  "update_goods_dto": {
    "tts_goods_id": "8839232030",
    "goods_name": "ABC",
    "goods_image_url": "https://img0.baidu.com/it/u=3591665277,2616537962\u0026fm=253\u0026app=138\u0026f=JPEG?w=800\u0026h=1333",
    "reference_code": "ABDK999d",
    "barcode_infos": [
      {
        "barcode_type": "1",
        "barcode_value": "223333"
      }
    ],
    "return_handling_method": "COLLECT_RETURN_UNITS",
    "dimension_and_weight_base_info": {
      "weight_value": "1",
      "length_value": "1",
      "width_value": "1",
      "height_value": "1",
      "weight_unit": "1",
      "dimension_unit": "1"
    },
    "is_hazmat": false,
    "hazmat_info": {
      "hazmat_type": "BATTERY",
      "battery_extra_info": {
        "battery_type": "LITHIUM_ION",
        "battery_packaging_type": "STANDALONE",
        "total_battery_weight": "10",
        "total_battery_weight_unit": "GRAM",
        "total_battery_capacity": "2",
        "total_battery_capacity_unit": "WATTHOUR",
        "is_need_un_38_3_test": false,
        "un_38_3_test_file_url": "https://img0.baidu.com/it/u=3591665277,2616537962\u0026fm=253\u0026app=138\u0026f=JPEG?w=800\u0026h=1333",
        "battery_count_per_package": "3"
      },
      "flammable_liquids_extra_info": {
        "flammable_liquids_type": "PAINT",
        "flammable_liquids_volume": "1",
        "volume_unit": "MILLILITERS"
      },
      "dg_class": "ClASS_3",
      "dg_uncode": "UN2807",
      "msds_file_url": "https://img0.baidu.com/it/u=3591665277,2616537962\u0026fm=253\u0026app=138\u0026f=JPEG?w=800\u0026h=1333"
    },
    "is_lot_code": false,
    "is_expiration_management": false,
    "shelf_life_attribute_info": {
      "shelf_life": 10,
      "inbound_cutoff_days": 90,
      "expiration_alert_days": 80,
      "sales_cutoff_days": 70,
      "handling_method_expired_goods": "DISPOSE",
      "return_cycle": "ONCE_A_WEEK",
      "return_address_info": {
        "name": "abc",
        "phone_number": "12221212121",
        "postal_code": "92376",
        "region_code": "US",
        "state": "CA",
        "district": "San Bernardino",
        "city": "Rialto",
        "address_line1": "1420 Tamarind Ave, Rialto, San Bernardino",
        "address_line2": "1420 Tamarind Ave, Rialto, San Bernardino"
      }
    }
  }
}'

sample_code.label: Go
sample_code.value:
// For more details about the SDK, refer to the documentation:
// https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/67c83e0799a75104986ae498
func fbt202603UpdateGoodsPost() {
    configuration := apis.NewConfiguration()
    configuration.AddAppInfo(appKey, appSecret)
    apiClient := apis.NewAPIClient(configuration)
    request := apiClient.FbtV202603API.Fbt202603GoodsUpdateGoodsInfoPost(context.Background())
    request = request.XTtsAccessToken("your access token")
    request = request.ContentType("application/json")
    request = request.ShopCipher("your shop cipher")
    fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBody := fbt_v202603.NewFbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBody()
    fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDto := fbt_v202603.NewFbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDto()
    fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDto.SetTtsGoodsId("8839232030")
    fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDto.SetGoodsName("ABC")
    fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDto.SetGoodsImageUrl("https://img0.baidu.com/it/u=3591665277,2616537962&fm=253&app=138&f=JPEG?w=800&h=1333")
    fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDto.SetReferenceCode("ABDK999d")
    fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDtoBarcodeInfos := fbt_v202603.NewFbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDtoBarcodeInfos()
    fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDtoBarcodeInfos.SetBarcodeType("1")
    fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDtoBarcodeInfos.SetBarcodeValue("223333")
    fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDtoBarcodeInfosList := []fbt_v202603.Fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDtoBarcodeInfos{*fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDtoBarcodeInfos}
    fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDto.SetBarcodeInfos(fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDtoBarcodeInfosList)
    fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDto.SetReturnHandlingMethod("COLLECT_RETURN_UNITS")
    fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDtoDimensionAndWeightBaseInfo := fbt_v202603.NewFbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDtoDimensionAndWeightBaseInfo()
    fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDtoDimensionAndWeightBaseInfo.SetWeightValue("1")
    fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDtoDimensionAndWeightBaseInfo.SetLengthValue("1")
    fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDtoDimensionAndWeightBaseInfo.SetWidthValue("1")
    fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDtoDimensionAndWeightBaseInfo.SetHeightValue("1")
    fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDtoDimensionAndWeightBaseInfo.SetWeightUnit("1")
    fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDtoDimensionAndWeightBaseInfo.SetDimensionUnit("1")
    fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDto.SetDimensionAndWeightBaseInfo(*fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDtoDimensionAndWeightBaseInfo)
    fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDto.SetIsHazmat(false)
    fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDtoHazmatInfo := fbt_v202603.NewFbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDtoHazmatInfo()
    fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDtoHazmatInfo.SetHazmatType("BATTERY")
    fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDtoHazmatInfoBatteryExtraInfo := fbt_v202603.NewFbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDtoHazmatInfoBatteryExtraInfo()
    fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDtoHazmatInfoBatteryExtraInfo.SetBatteryType("LITHIUM_ION")
    fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDtoHazmatInfoBatteryExtraInfo.SetBatteryPackagingType("STANDALONE")
    fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDtoHazmatInfoBatteryExtraInfo.SetTotalBatteryWeight("10")
    fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDtoHazmatInfoBatteryExtraInfo.SetTotalBatteryWeightUnit("GRAM")
    fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDtoHazmatInfoBatteryExtraInfo.SetTotalBatteryCapacity("2")
    fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDtoHazmatInfoBatteryExtraInfo.SetTotalBatteryCapacityUnit("WATTHOUR")
    fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDtoHazmatInfoBatteryExtraInfo.SetIsNeedUn383Test(false)
    fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDtoHazmatInfoBatteryExtraInfo.SetUn383TestFileUrl("https://img0.baidu.com/it/u=3591665277,2616537962&fm=253&app=138&f=JPEG?w=800&h=1333")
    fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDtoHazmatInfoBatteryExtraInfo.SetBatteryCountPerPackage("3")
    fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDtoHazmatInfo.SetBatteryExtraInfo(*fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDtoHazmatInfoBatteryExtraInfo)
    fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDtoHazmatInfoFlammableLiquidsExtraInfo := fbt_v202603.NewFbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDtoHazmatInfoFlammableLiquidsExtraInfo()
    fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDtoHazmatInfoFlammableLiquidsExtraInfo.SetFlammableLiquidsType("PAINT")
    fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDtoHazmatInfoFlammableLiquidsExtraInfo.SetFlammableLiquidsVolume("1")
    fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDtoHazmatInfoFlammableLiquidsExtraInfo.SetVolumeUnit("MILLILITERS")
    fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDtoHazmatInfo.SetFlammableLiquidsExtraInfo(*fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDtoHazmatInfoFlammableLiquidsExtraInfo)
    fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDtoHazmatInfo.SetDgClass("ClASS_3")
    fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDtoHazmatInfo.SetDgUncode("UN2807")
    fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDtoHazmatInfo.SetMsdsFileUrl("https://img0.baidu.com/it/u=3591665277,2616537962&fm=253&app=138&f=JPEG?w=800&h=1333")
    fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDto.SetHazmatInfo(*fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDtoHazmatInfo)
    fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDto.SetIsLotCode(false)
    fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDto.SetIsExpirationManagement(false)
    fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDtoShelfLifeAttributeInfo := fbt_v202603.NewFbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDtoShelfLifeAttributeInfo()
    fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDtoShelfLifeAttributeInfo.SetShelfLife(10)
    fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDtoShelfLifeAttributeInfo.SetInboundCutoffDays(90)
    fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDtoShelfLifeAttributeInfo.SetExpirationAlertDays(80)
    fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDtoShelfLifeAttributeInfo.SetSalesCutoffDays(70)
    fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDtoShelfLifeAttributeInfo.SetHandlingMethodExpiredGoods("DISPOSE")
    fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDtoShelfLifeAttributeInfo.SetReturnCycle("ONCE_A_WEEK")
    fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDtoShelfLifeAttributeInfoReturnAddressInfo := fbt_v202603.NewFbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDtoShelfLifeAttributeInfoReturnAddressInfo()
    fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDtoShelfLifeAttributeInfoReturnAddressInfo.SetName("abc")
    fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDtoShelfLifeAttributeInfoReturnAddressInfo.SetPhoneNumber("12221212121")
    fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDtoShelfLifeAttributeInfoReturnAddressInfo.SetPostalCode("92376")
    fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDtoShelfLifeAttributeInfoReturnAddressInfo.SetRegionCode("US")
    fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDtoShelfLifeAttributeInfoReturnAddressInfo.SetState("CA")
    fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDtoShelfLifeAttributeInfoReturnAddressInfo.SetDistrict("San Bernardino")
    fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDtoShelfLifeAttributeInfoReturnAddressInfo.SetCity("Rialto")
    fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDtoShelfLifeAttributeInfoReturnAddressInfo.SetAddressLine1("1420 Tamarind Ave, Rialto, San Bernardino")
    fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDtoShelfLifeAttributeInfoReturnAddressInfo.SetAddressLine2("1420 Tamarind Ave, Rialto, San Bernardino")
    fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDtoShelfLifeAttributeInfo.SetReturnAddressInfo(*fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDtoShelfLifeAttributeInfoReturnAddressInfo)
    fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDto.SetShelfLifeAttributeInfo(*fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDtoShelfLifeAttributeInfo)
    fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBody.SetUpdateGoodsDto(*fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBodyUpdateGoodsDto)
    request = request.Fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBody(*fbt202603UpdateGoodsRequestBody)
    resp, httpResp, err := request.Execute()
    if err != nil || httpResp.StatusCode != 200 {
        fmt.Printf("productsRequest err:%v resbody:%s", err, httpResp.Body)
        return
    }
    if resp == nil {
        fmt.Printf("response is nil")
        return
    }
    if resp.GetCode()!= 0 {
        fmt.Printf("response business is error, errorCode:%d errorMessage:%s", resp.GetCode(), resp.GetMessage())
        return
    }
    respDataJson, _ := json.MarshalIndent(resp.GetData(), "", "  ")
    fmt.Println("response data:", string(respDataJson))
    return
}

Java

scope_list.package_description: You can push and manage your order information to the FBT System. FBT will fulfill your orders on your behalf and notify you in a timely manner if any anomalies occur with the orders.
scope_list.auth_info: You can push and manage your order information to the FBT System. FBT will fulfill your orders on your behalf and notify you in a timely manner if any anomalies occur with the orders.
